display.purpose: Hero headlines and page titles only.

shadows.name: modal-elevation
shadows.purpose: Deep shadow for floating z-axis overlays.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Used for main call to actions.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">ดำเนินการสั่งซื้อ</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #3ecf8e; color: #171717; padding: 6px 12px; font-weight: 500; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; border: 1px solid #3ecf8e; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #24b47e; border-color: #24b47e; }

components.name: Hardware Card
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #dfdfdf; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0 0 8px 0; color: #171717; font-weight: 500; font-size: 16px; } .ds-card p { margin: 0; color: #707070; font-size: 14px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Clean white input with green focus ring.
components.html: <input type="text" class="ds-input" placeholder="ค้นหาฮาร์ดแวร์..." />
components.css: .ds-input { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #dfdfdf; border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #171717; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; outline: none; transition: all 0.2s; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #3ecf8e; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(62,207,142,0.08); }

narrative.overview: This visual system embraces a developer-focused, highly clinical, and ultra-clean aesthetic inspired by modern technical dashboards like Supabase. It uses a pristine white canvas anchored by razor-thin hairline borders and restrained Emerald green accents. The aesthetic philosophy is rooted in technical clarity and expert confidence—where the interface disappears into the task of building a PC, rather than calling attention to itself through flashy decorations. We explicitly reject dark mode neon glows, thick colorful borders, and unnecessary glassmorphism.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained color strategy: primarily white/gray canvas with a single Emerald accent.
Hairline borders (1px) for structure rather than heavy shadows or distinct backgrounds.
Layered with subtle, soft shadows strictly for elevation.

rules.name: The Restrained Accent Rule
rules.body: The primary Emerald accent is used on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point. Do not use it as a large background fill except for primary call-to-action buttons.

rules.name: The System Native Rule
rules.body: System fonts carry the entire product UI. Do not introduce a secondary display font for "flavor"; the clinical feel relies on the uniformity and speed of native OS rendering.

rules.name: The Border-First Rule
rules.body: Rely on 1px hairline borders to separate content areas. Use shadows sparingly, only for interactive feedback (hover) or z-axis overlays (modals, dropdowns).

dos: Do use var(--hairline) for all borders to maintain a crisp, clinical layout.
Do ensure text contrast by relying on var(--ink) for body copy and var(--ink-mute) only for non-critical metadata.
Do leverage the monospace font for technical specifications or hardware model numbers.
donts: Don't use dark mode with purple gradients, neon accents, or glassmorphism. (This was the old "Cyber Forge" anti-pattern).
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards.
Don't use gradient text anywhere in the interface.
Don't use heavy, dark shadows on cards; the page should feel light and layered, not thick.
